flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Porter & Chester Institute vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.4k vs 1.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Porter & Chester Institute fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6k → 1.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 15 pp at Porter & Chester Institute vs the 2003–2007 baseline (49.4% vs 64.4%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Porter & Chester Institute fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (57.3% → 49.1%).
